channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.description: The attack on the popular NPM package Axios is just one of many targeting maintainers and has shone a light on how threat actors can scale sophisticated social engineering campaigns....

item.title: Maine House advances McCabe bill to strengthen cybersecurity at Maine hospitals
item.description: A press release on April 6, 2026 from Maine House Democrats: On Thursday, the Maine House voted unanimously to advance a bill from Rep. Julie McCabe, D-Lewiston, that would help prevent cybersecurity...

item.title: Fortinet Issues Emergency Patch for FortiClient Zero-Day
item.description: The authentication bypass flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-35616, is the latest in a series of Fortinet vulnerabilities that have been exploited in the wild....

item.title: Expert Says North Korean IT Workers Helped Build Top Protocols During DeFi Summer
item.description: North Korean developers weren't faking resumes, said Taylor Monahan, who went on to add that they were actively building prominent DeFi platforms and later enabled billions in crypto losses....

item.title: Disgruntled researcher leaks “BlueHammer” Windows zero-day exploit
item.description: Exploit code has been released for an unpatched Windows privilege escalation flaw reported privately to Microsoft, allowing attackers to gain SYSTEM or elevated administrator permissions. [...]...

item.title: Microsoft fixes Classic Outlook bug causing email delivery issues
item.description: Microsoft has resolved a known issue that was preventing some Classic Outlook users from sending emails via Outlook.com. [...]...

item.title: Iran-Linked Password-Spraying Campaign Targets 300+ Israeli Microsoft 365 Organizations
item.description: An Iran-nexus threat actor is suspected to be behind a password-spraying campaign targeting Microsoft 365 environments in Israel and the U.A.E. amid ongoing conflict in the Middle East. The activity, ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Microsoft removes Support and Recovery Assistant from Windows
item.description: Microsoft has deprecated and removed the Support and Recovery Assistant (SaRA) command-line utility from all in-support versions of Windows updates starting March 10. [...]...

item.title: Drift $280M crypto theft linked to 6-month in-person operation

item.title: DPRK-Linked Hackers Use GitHub as C2 in Multi-Stage Attacks Targeting South Korea
